{{CargoRelic
|name=Pisces
|class_id=21938
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Nature's first green is gold,
Her hardest hue to hold.
|fame=110
|art=48
|fth=69
|civ=70
|tech=65
|ss1=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss2=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss3=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss4=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss5=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss6=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%
|ss7=Mane of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Horn of Fate skill DMG +20%<br>Reverse Scale of Fate organ skill, restore HP upon triggering +50%<br>Scale of Fate organ skill, additionally reduces enemy DEF by 30%<br>Snail Leadership +40 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Arena, grants effect: All ELMT DMG +30%
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG +30%
|skill3=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +900
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Pisces Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Copernicus|3rec=10.72M|3atk=85213|3defense=56473|3hp=2122418|3weak=?
|4name=Chopin|4rec=23.58M|4atk=116300|4defense=77076|4hp=3720655|4weak=?
|5name=Hugo|5rec=40.97M|5atk=153220|5defense=101544|5hp=6280919|5weak=?
|6name=Washington|6rec=61.86M|6atk=197552|6defense=130925|6hp=10156948|6weak=?
|Arec=86.01M|Aatk=248823|Adefense=164904|Ahp=14520770|Aweak=?
}}}}
